data.title: Explosion Reported Near UAE Anchorage, Says Ambrey
data.description: A commercial vessel has reported hearing an explosion near the anchorage off the coast of Sharjah, United Arab Emirates, according to Ambrey, a UK maritime security company. The exact distance of the explosion from the vessel remains unclear. Further details about the incident are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Missile Interception Occurs Amid UAE Attack, Reports Ambrey
data.description: A missile interception took place during an attack on the United Arab Emirates, according to a report by the UK maritime security company Ambrey. The incident was evaluated as part of the ongoing security challenges in the region. According to Jin10, the interception highlights the heightened tensions and security measures being implemented in response to regional threats. The specifics of the attack and the interception remain under investigation as authorities work to ensure maritime safety.

data.title: Petrobras CEO Confirms No Immediate Plans to Adjust Gasoline Prices
data.description: Petrobras CEO has announced that the company will not be considering any adjustments to gasoline prices in the near future. According to Jin10, this decision comes amidst ongoing discussions about market conditions and economic factors influencing fuel pricing. The CEO emphasized that Petrobras is closely monitoring the situation but does not foresee any immediate changes. This announcement aims to provide clarity to consumers and stakeholders regarding the company's pricing strategy.

data.title: Brazilian Oil Refineries' Maintenance Shutdowns Delayed
data.description: Executives from Brazil's state-controlled oil company have announced a delay in the scheduled maintenance shutdowns of the Replan and Repar refineries. According to Jin10, the postponement is due to operational adjustments and strategic considerations. The decision aims to ensure continued production and supply stability in the face of fluctuating market demands. The Replan and Repar refineries are among the largest in Brazil, playing a crucial role in the country's oil processing capacity. The delay in maintenance is expected to help maintain steady output levels, supporting both domestic and international supply chains.

data.title: U.S. Air Force Tanker Crash in Iraq Results in Six Fatalities
data.description: A U.S. Air Force official reported that a tanker aircraft crashed in western Iraq on Thursday, resulting in the deaths of all six crew members on board. According to Jin10, the aircraft was not equipped with an ejection system or parachutes, which could have allowed the crew to evacuate mid-air. The incident highlights the risks faced by military personnel during operations. Further investigations are underway to determine the cause of the crash.

data.title: Bitcoin Rises Nearly 10% Following February Airstrikes
data.description:
Bitcoin experienced a significant increase of nearly 10% in the two weeks following the February 28 airstrikes that resulted in the death of Ali Khamenei and sparked a regional conflict. According to NS3.AI, this geopolitical tension has influenced market dynamics, leading to notable movements in the cryptocurrency sector.

In related developments, Token2049 Dubai has been postponed, and the TON Network has canceled its Gateway Dubai event. Additionally, Sky has reduced its buyback program by 87% to bolster its USDS reserves, reflecting strategic adjustments in response to the evolving market conditions.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts HYPE Could Reach $150 with Strong Revenue and Trading Activity
data.description: Arthur Hayes has expressed optimism about the future of HYPE, suggesting that its value could reach $150 if Hyperliquid maintains robust revenue and genuine trading activity. According to NS3.AI, Hayes noted that the platform is currently generating nearly a $1 billion annualized revenue run rate, based on data from the past 30 days of fees.

data.title: University of Connecticut Women's Basketball Team Boosts Athletic Department
data.description: The University of Connecticut's women's basketball team has established itself as a dominant force in March Madness tournaments. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the team's significant contribution to the school's athletic department's financial success. The team's consistent performance not only elevates the university's reputation in collegiate sports but also plays a crucial role in generating revenue for the athletic department. This success underscores the importance of women's sports in collegiate athletics and their impact on university finances.

data.title: Brazilian Oil CEO Attributes Diesel Price Surge to Middle East Conflict
data.description: The CEO of Brazil's state-run oil company has identified the ongoing conflict in the Middle East as a key factor driving the recent increase in diesel prices. According to Jin10, the executive emphasized that geopolitical tensions in the region have disrupted supply chains and affected global oil markets, leading to heightened costs for diesel. The situation underscores the vulnerability of energy prices to international events, with potential implications for both consumers and industries reliant on diesel fuel. The CEO's remarks highlight the interconnected nature of global markets and the impact of geopolitical instability on commodity prices.

data.title: Alphadots Puzzle Challenges Enthusiasts with Motion Picture Theme
data.description: A new puzzle challenge has emerged, inviting enthusiasts to solve today's Alphadots with a hint related to motion pictures. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the intriguing nature of the puzzle, which features a sequence of letters with blanks to be filled in. Participants are encouraged to engage with the puzzle and test their skills in deciphering the theme. The puzzle, characterized by its unique format, continues to captivate those interested in word games and intellectual challenges.

data.title: European Automakers Confront Plant Capacity Challenges
data.description: European automakers are grappling with underutilized production facilities, posing a significant challenge for the industry. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the dilemma faced by companies like Stellantis, which is seeking solutions to address the issue without provoking backlash from unions and political figures. The situation underscores the complexities of balancing operational efficiency with socio-political considerations in the automotive sector.

data.title: Large Transfer of TON Tokens Observed from Kiln to Anonymous Address
data.description: A significant transfer of TON tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 00:57, a total of 3,921,659.4 TON tokens were moved from Kiln to an anonymous address starting with EQAf4vJc2T. The transaction highlights ongoing activity within the TON network.

data.title: Polymarket's betting odds on the Colombian presidential election are neck and neck, with the top two candidates having similar probabilities.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in Polymarket's predictions for the Colombian presidential election, the odds for the leading candidates have narrowed further today, with the difference in their chances of winning now less than 3%, rapidly squeezing their lead. Specifically, Iván Cepeda Castro's probability of winning has continued to decline to 40%, while Paloma Valencia's has risen to 37.8%. Iván Cepeda Castro is a left-wing Colombian senator and potential presidential candidate, a human rights politician who advocates for peace negotiations and social reforms. Paloma Valencia is a right-wing Colombian senator and potential presidential candidate, a representative of the "Uribe faction," who advocates for a hardline security and conservative policy approach. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before they are priced in.

data.title: Iran Arrests Man for Providing Unrestricted Internet Access via Starlink
data.description: Iranian authorities have arrested a 37-year-old man for offering unrestricted internet access using Starlink equipment in Fars Province. According to Jin10, this development comes as Iran faces nearly three weeks of widespread internet shutdowns, following the onset of conflict. The Iranian government has implemented nationwide internet restrictions, and the country is reportedly nearing a complete network disruption, as noted by internet monitoring organization NetBlocks.

data.title: U.S. Oil Rig Count Decreases by 75 Compared to Last Year
data.description: The number of oil drilling rigs in the United States has decreased by 75 compared to the same period last year. According to Jin10, this decline reflects ongoing adjustments in the energy sector. The reduction in active rigs may impact future oil production levels and market dynamics. Industry analysts are closely monitoring these changes to assess their potential effects on the global oil market.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 72,000 USDT with a 2.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2026, 16:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 72,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 72,003.351563 USDT, with a narrowed 2.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Iraqi Militia Offers Reward for Information on U.S. Military Personnel
data.description: On March 13, local time, the Iraqi militia group 'Islamic Resistance' issued a statement seeking information from all Iraqi citizens and foreign nationals within Iraq regarding U.S. military and intelligence personnel. According to Jin10, the group announced a reward of 150 million Iraqi dinars for accurate intelligence that could lead to the capture or elimination of U.S. military officials or intelligence leaders. Earlier that day, the 'Islamic Resistance' claimed responsibility for 31 drone and rocket attacks on U.S. targets in Iraq and surrounding areas. Since February 28, the group has conducted a total of 335 attacks.

data.title: New York Lawmaker Proposes Estate Tax Increase
data.description: New York Assemblyman Zohran Mamdani has introduced a proposal to significantly increase the state's estate tax. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the plan suggests raising the tax rate to 50% and lowering the threshold to $750,000 from the current level of over $7 million. This proposal aims to address wealth inequality and generate additional revenue for the state. The suggested changes would mark a substantial shift in New York's tax policy, potentially impacting many residents. The proposal is expected to spark debate among lawmakers and the public as discussions unfold.

data.title: Pointed Game Challenges Players to Achieve Perfect Score
data.description: The latest edition of the game Pointed has seen only 35 players achieve a perfect score. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenge for players to join the exclusive 190-point club. The game continues to attract participants eager to test their skills and reach this milestone.

data.title: Marathon Digital Sells 298 BTC Amid Market Adjustments
data.description: Marathon Digital Holdings has reportedly sold 298 Bitcoin, according to NS3.AI. This move comes as the company adjusts its strategy in response to current market conditions. Marathon Digital, known for its significant presence in the cryptocurrency mining sector, has been actively managing its Bitcoin holdings to optimize its financial position. The sale reflects a broader trend among crypto companies seeking to balance their portfolios amid fluctuating market dynamics. As the industry continues to evolve, firms like Marathon Digital are making strategic decisions to navigate the complexities of the cryptocurrency landscape.
